scripts.build:zip: npm run build && cd dist-chrome && zip -r ../newsbox-chrome.zip . && cd ../dist-firefox && zip -r ../newsbox-firefox.zip . && cd ../dist-safari && zip -r ../newsbox-safari.zip .
scripts.build:safari-xcode: npm run build && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter dist-safari --project-location safari-xcode --app-name NewsBox --bundle-identifier com.newsbox.safari-extension --no-open
